profile.background: Rancher raised on family sheep and cattle operation; served in Idaho Senate and as lieutenant governor; became 33rd governor in 2019.

profile.education: Brigham Young University (BA Political Science), Harvard Law School (JD)
profile.background: Former attorney and Idaho State Senator. Served in U.S. House from 1993-1999. Chairman of Senate Finance Committee. In Senate since 1999.

profile.education: University of Wisconsin (BS Forestry), University of Idaho College of Law (JD)
profile.background: Former Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Idaho. Former Ada County Prosecutor and Idaho State Senator. Rancher and attorney. In Senate since 2009. Foreign Relations Committee member.
